name: @mjweavermount/rta
description: RTA app-authoring platform for governed, observable, reviewable applications from domain vocabulary.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @rta/vocab build && pnpm --filter @rta/core build && pnpm --filter @rta/strict build && pnpm --filter @rta/runtime build && pnpm --filter @rta/cli build && pnpm --filter @rta/scenario build && pnpm --filter @rta/example-meeting-digest build && pnpm --filter @rta/example-affine-ops-gateway build && pnpm --filter @rta/example-rta-monitor build
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm check:affine-ops-gateway && pnpm check:pure-ts && pnpm check:work-ledger && pnpm check:demo-coverage && pnpm check:release
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @rta/vocab test && pnpm --filter @rta/core test && pnpm --filter @rta/strict test && pnpm --filter @rta/runtime test && pnpm --filter @rta/cli test && pnpm --filter @rta/scenario test && pnpm --filter @rta/example-meeting-digest test && pnpm --filter @rta/example-affine-ops-gateway test && pnpm --filter @rta/example-rta-monitor test
scripts.demo:affine-monitor: pnpm --filter @rta/example-affine-ops-gateway build && pnpm --filter @rta/example-rta-monitor build && rm -rf tmp/affine-monitor-demo && mkdir -p tmp/affine-monitor-demo && node examples/affine-ops-gateway/dist/cli.js run affine.current_user --root tmp/affine-monitor-demo --profile fake && node examples/rta-monitor/dist/cli.js runs --root tmp/affine-monitor-demo && node examples/rta-monitor/dist/cli.js tail --root tmp/affine-monitor-demo
